case_title: NIERIKA KIMIMEYLA VS. OHANA PARTNERS INC. DBA STUART RENTAL CO.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY KIMIMEYLA, NIERIKA AS TO DEFENDANT OHANA PARTNERS INC. DBA STUART RENTAL CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-20-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT OHANA PARTNERS INC. DBA STUART RENTAL CO.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIMIMEYLA, NIERIKA AS TO DEFENDANT OHANA PARTNERS INC. DBA STUART RENTAL CO.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-01-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OHANA PARTNERS INC. DBA STUART RENTAL CO.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL BERMAN--PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
